alkylation reagent: 70 μL of iodoacetamide (400 mM in PBS)
alkylation concentration: 70 μL of iodoacetamide (400 mM in PBS)
cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37°C in 200 μL of trypsin solution
enrichment method: biotinylated proteins were enriched with streptavidin beads
instrument: analyzed with a Thermo Fisher Scientific Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: adding 50 μL of freshly prepared 1:1 solution of TCEP (200 mM in PBS)
